ats_utilities.config_io.config_io_registry module¶

Module

config_io_registry.py

Info

Encapsulates core config I/O components for simplification of ConfigIOBundle creation.

class ats_utilities.config_io.config_io_registry.ConfigIORegistry[source]¶

Bases: IRegistry[ConfigIOBundle, ConfigIOParams]

Encapsulates core config I/O components for simplification of ConfigIOBundle creation.

It defines:

methods:
create_bundle - Creates a ConfigIOBundle instance using either file path and scheme or injected processor.
create_config_io_bundle_by_file_path_and_scheme - Creates a ConfigIOBundle based on file path and scheme.
create_config_io_bundle_by_injected_processor - Creates a ConfigIOBundle with injected processor.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
classmethod create_bundle(params: ConfigIOParams) → ConfigIOBundle[source]¶

Creates a ConfigIOBundle instance using either file path and scheme or injected processor.

Parameters:

params (ConfigIOParams) – Registry-specific orchestration parameters.

Returns:

ConfigIOBundle instance.

Return type:

<ConfigIOBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: File path must be provided.
ATSValueError: Scheme must be provided.
ATSValueError: Context bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: File path must be a string.
ATSTypeError: Scheme must be an instance of Mapping interface.
ATSTypeError: Context bundle must be an instance of ContextBundle interface.
classmethod create_config_io_bundle_by_file_path_and_scheme(file_path: str, scheme: Mapping[str, str], context_bundle: ContextBundle) → ConfigIOBundle[source]¶

Creates a ConfigIOBundle with pre-configured components based on file path and scheme.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<str>) – Config file path.

  • scheme (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Config scheme.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – Context bundle for dependency injection.

Returns:

ConfigIOBundle instance.

Return type:

<ConfigIOBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: File path must be provided.
ATSValueError: Scheme must be provided.
ATSValueError: Context bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: File path must be a string.
ATSTypeError: Scheme must be an instance of Mapping interface.
ATSTypeError: Context bundle must be an instance of ContextBundle interface.
classmethod create_config_io_bundle_by_injected_processor(processor: IConfigProcessor, context_bundle: ContextBundle) → ConfigIOBundle[source]¶

Creates a ConfigIOBundle with injected processor.

Parameters:

  • processor (<IConfigProcessor>) – Config processor.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – Context bundle for dependency injection.

Returns:

ConfigIOBundle instance.

Return type:

<ConfigIOBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: File path must be provided.
ATSValueError: Scheme must be provided.
ATSValueError: Context bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: File path must be a string.
ATSTypeError: Scheme must be an instance of Mapping interface.
ATSTypeError: Context bundle must be an instance of ContextBundle interface.
